name: One Time Migration
description: Initial transfer of all selected Slack data including channels, direct messages, files, and metadata from the source Slack workspace to the destination Google Chat space. Preserves message history, user attribution, and supported formatting.

name: Delta Migration
description: Incremental transfer of new or updated data from Slack to Microsoft Teams after the One-Time Migration. Captures the latest messages, files, and supported updates, ensuring the destination remains up to date.

name: Public Channels
description: Migrates all public channels with message history, files, reactions, and metadata. All public channels are migrated as Private channels.

name: Non-Admin Public Channels
description: Public channels where the admin is not a member are also migrated, ensuring complete workspace coverage. All public channels are migrated as Private channels.

name: Private Channels
description: Private channels are migrated while preserving access restrictions and message confidentiality.

name: Non-Admin Private Channels
description: Private channels where the admin does not have access are migrated.

name: Channel Members
description: Ensures all channel members are correctly mapped and added in the destination space with preserved permissions.

name: Channel Mentions
description: All channel references (e.g., #channel-name) are migrated as clickable links.

name: Tagged Channel Mentions
description: Tagged channel mentions will migrate as text.

name: User Mentions
description: User mentions (@username) are migrated, except for unmapped users.

name: Members Posted Username
description: Displays the original message author to maintain attribution.

children.name: Members Posted Username (active user not mapped)
children.description: Messages from active unmapped users appear under Admin with "via user" label.

children.name: Members Posted Username (inactive user not mapped)
children.description: Messages from inactive unmapped users are moved to Conflict.

children.name: Members Posted Username (external user not mapped)
children.description: Messages from external unmapped users appear under Admin with "via external user" label.

children.name: Members Posted Username (deactivated user)
children.description: Messages from deactivated users are migrated under Admin name.

name: Channel Description
description: Channel descriptions are migrated and visible in the destination cloud.

name: Archived Channels
description: Archived channels are migrated with full message history; only the channel creator is added initially.

name: Replies in Channels
description: Threaded replies are preserved as replies or migrated as individual messages based on destination limitations.

name: Group DMs
description: Migrates multi-user direct message conversations securely.

name: Non-Admin Group DMs
description: Group DMs without admin participation are supported.

name: One-on-One DMs
description: All one-to-one conversations are migrated with timestamps and message attribution.

name: Non-Admin One-on-One DMs
description: One-on-one DMs where admin is not involved are included.

name: Members Posted Username (DMs)
description: Preserves original sender information for each DM.

name: DM Members
description: All DM participants are correctly mapped and added.

name: User Mentions in DMs
description: User mentions inside DMs are retained where mapping exists.

name: Replies in Direct Messages
description: Replies in DMs are migrated as individual messages due to platform constraints.

name: Ordered List
description: List formatting is maintained during migration.

name: Bullet List
description: Bullet list formatting is maintained during migration.

name: Bold
description: Bold text formatting is maintained.

name: Italic
description: Italic text formatting is maintained.

name: Strike Through
description: Strikethrough formatting is maintained.

name: Code Block
description: Code block formatting is maintained.

name: Snippet
description: Snippets are migrated as document format.

name: Audio Message
description: Audio messages are supported in migration.

name: Video Message
description: Video messages are supported in migration.

name: Emojis
description: Emojis are preserved during migration.

name: Reactions
description: Reactions are preserved during migration.

name: Forwarded Message
description: Forwarded messages are supported for channels.

name: Link of a Message
description: Message links are migrated as clickable URLs.

name: Links
description: Hyperlinks and shared file links are supported.

name: All Types of Files
description: All supported file types are migrated with size limitations.

name: Canva Files
description: Canva files are migrated as .html file.

name: List Files
description: Files shared within lists or messages are migrated.

name: Files Posted from Drive / SharePoint
description: Migrated as links when direct upload is not supported.

name: GIFs
description: Animated GIFs are preserved. Migrated as links.

name: Stickers
description: Stickers are migrated where supported. Migrated as links.
